arts.ttl: The last four Newcastle United teams to beat Liverpool away after 30 years of Anfield hurt
arts.sum: Newcastle United head to Anfield bidding once again to end their awful record against Liverpool in front of the Kop. It was another South American striker who would help United to this most unlikely of wins, 38 long years after the last Anfield success.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Van Dijk v Isak: League's best defender faces this season's top striker
arts.sum: Meanwhile, in one of the matches where he failed to score, Isak drew a foul from Van Dijk that saw the latter handed a straight red card. Isak will not be fazed by the challenge as he has scored three goals in five appearances against Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'I will return': £25m player Liverpool sold suggests he wants to come back to Anfield in three years
Newcastle transfer news: Eddie Howe's side eye ex-academy player as part of £97m Bournemouth raid?
arts.sum: Newcastle will reportedly consider raiding Eddie Howe's former side Bournemouth for three of their star players in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2024/25 points tally predicted ahead of Arsenal Premier League title showdown
arts.sum: Liverpool command the Premier League title race with an 11-point gap over challengers Arsenal

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool defender admits desire to rejoin Reds
arts.sum: One of Liverpool's former centre-backs has admitted that he wants to return to Anfield.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique doesn’t view PSG as underdog heading into Liverpool game
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain head into their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 game with confidence, and rightly so. PSG are unbeaten domestically this season. As well as being in the quarter-finals…

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent Mohamed Salah verdict with Lionel Messi's 'heir' named as perfect replacement
arts.sum: With Mo Salah's contract situation still unsolved, Liverpool must start considering possible replacements for the Egyptian, and Emmanuel Petit thinks he's found the 'perfect' one

arts.ttl: Newcastle player ‘biggest victim’ of club’s latest decision – Magpies man was offered for transfer
arts.sum: Newcastle United’s Alexander Isak has been linked to a few top clubs and Barcelona are one of them. The striker has impressed for the Magpies this season, managing 21 goals and five assists from 30 games. There’s been growing interest in the Newcastle star and recent claims have stated Barca are in the mix.
